name: codex-usage-tray
description: Windows notification-area monitor for locally recorded Codex usage limits, with dual large-number tray icons, notifications, custom styles, and configurable thresholds.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Codex usage limits with clear tray icons.
interface.longDescription: A local Windows tray companion that reads the latest Codex session usage snapshot and shows available 5-hour and weekly limit status without sending account data anywhere. It supports both dual-window and newer weekly-only snapshots, plus large-number tray icons, icon style modes, low-usage notifications, richer menu actions, compact tooltips, custom assets, and configurable thresholds/colors.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install or troubleshoot the Codex Usage Tray Windows companion.
